en_title: Entire Luna Abyss Development Team Laid Off One Month After Launch
cn_title: 《Luna Abyss》发售仅一月即全团队被裁
subtitle: 叫好不叫座
opus_summary: 好评射击游戏《Luna Abyss》发售仅一月，9人开发团队被裁。尽管Metacritic评分81，但商业表现惨淡，Steam峰值仅317人。正值暑期行业裁员潮。

paragraphs.en: The entire development team for Luna Abyss , a well-received shooter that was released just a month ago, has been laid off. Hollie Emery, the CEO of Kwalee Labs, revealed the news in a LinkedIn post. Emery claimed that the decision to make the development team redundant was completely outside of their control.
paragraphs.cn: 好评射击游戏《Luna Abyss》发售仅一个月后，其整个开发团队便被解雇。Kwalee Labs首席执行官Hollie Emery在LinkedIn发帖公布此消息，并称裁员决定完全不受团队控制。

paragraphs.en: The decision was made despite piles of critical praise for Luna Abyss (the game holds an 81 on Metacritic). Unfortunately, it doesn't appear to have made a commercial splash. Luna Abyss peaked at 317 concurrent players on Steam, suggesting it hasn't found a big audience.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管《Luna Abyss》获得了铺天盖地的媒体好评（Metacritic评分81分），但该作似乎并未在商业上引起波澜。其在Steam上的最高同时在线玩家数仅有317人，表明未能吸引到大量受众。

paragraphs.en: The development team was made up of nine people, all of whom are now seeking work. The team spent seven years working on the game, which entered development in 2019. IGN first previewed the game back in 2023 and expressed plenty of optimism for the overall vision that Kwalee Labs had for Luna Abyss. That optimism trickled into another preview of the game earlier this year , ahead of the game's release, where we praised the game for its difficulty and slick gameplay.
paragraphs.cn: 该开发团队由九人组成，目前全员正在寻找新工作。团队花费了七年时间开发本作，项目于2019年启动。IGN最早在2023年试玩了本作，并对Kwalee Labs的整体愿景表达了充分的乐观。这种乐观延续到了今年游戏发售前的另一次试玩中，我们当时称赞了游戏的难度和流畅的玩法。

paragraphs.en: Luna Abyss is still available for purchase if you wish to give it a try yourself. The game is available on Xbox Series X|S, PS5, and PC for $29.99.
paragraphs.cn: 《Luna Abyss》目前仍在销售，售价29.99美元(约合人民币203元)，登陆平台包括Xbox Series、PS5和PC。

paragraphs.en: The news comes at a very unfortunate time, as news of gaming layoffs continues to make the rounds this summer. Bungie is expected to undergo "significant" layoffs next month as Destiny 2 winds down support, and a number of Xbox studios are reportedly under threat of closure , including Ninja Theory, Compulsion Games, and Double Fine. It's being reported that all three of these studios are negotiating with Microsoft to potentially go independent, although significant layoffs would still be likely in either case.
paragraphs.cn: 这则消息恰逢一个非常不幸的时机，因为今年夏天游戏行业裁员消息不断。随着《命运2》逐渐缩减支持，Bungie预计下月将进行「重大」裁员；另有报道称多家Xbox工作室面临关闭威胁，其中包括Ninja Theory、Compulsion Games和Double Fine。传闻这三家工作室正在与微软谈判，可能寻求独立，但无论结果如何，大幅裁员似乎仍不可避免。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道内容包括游戏、电影等各类娱乐资讯。你可以在X上找到他 @Cade_Onder。
